sections.title: If the Seal of Passage is equipped or in the inventory

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi! What are you up to?

lines.speaker: Bouquet Mac Hyacinth
lines.text: Watering the pretty flowers, you want to help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have time to water flowers, I have people to save!

lines.speaker: Bouquet Mac Hyacinth
lines.text: Pft, you should take time to enjoy the simple things.

sections.title: If the Seal of Passage is not equipped or in the inventory

lines.speaker: Bouquet Mac Hyacinth
lines.text: What are you doing here, Fremennik?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a seal of pass...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooops. Suppose I need a seal of passage when I'm walking around that island.
